steps.title: Find $y$
steps.content: So $y=1$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. The first equation in the given system of equations is $x=4$. Substituting $4$ for $x$ in the second equation in the given system of equations yields $y=5-4$, or $y=1$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ in the solution to the given system of equations, not the value of $y$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
